title: supply-chain: Stray firebase-debug.log committed at repo root (Firebase CLI artifact). No secrets inside, but it i…
description:
[P2 · supply-chain · audit] Stray firebase-debug.log committed at repo root (Firebase CLI artifact). No secrets inside, but it is junk that should not ship and is not gitignored.

Evidence: git ls-files shows firebase-debug.log tracked; 11 lines of Firebase MCP debug output dated 2026-03-08, no tokens/paths.

Fix: git rm --cached firebase-debug.log and add *.log / firebase-debug.log to .gitignore.

Source: launch-readiness audit 2026-06-18
